member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridMessage
member.summary: Represents a message that can be exchanged between hybrid application layers.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridMessage.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique message identifier.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridMessage.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the time when the message was created.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridMessageBus
member.summary: Provides a message bus for communication between hybrid application layers.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridMessageBus.PublishAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes the specified message.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous publish operation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridMessageBus.Subscribe``1(System.Func{``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Subscribes a handler to the specified message type.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridMessageBusExceptionHandler
member.summary: Defines a handler for exceptions thrown by individual message bus subscribers.
member.remarks: Implement this interface to observe subscriber failures without coupling the message bus to a concrete logging framework. Assign via . The default implementation is a no-op (null object).

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridMessageBusExceptionHandler.Handle(System.Exception,System.Type)
member.summary: Called when a subscriber handler throws an unhandled exception.
member.param: The exception thrown by the subscriber.
The type of the message being published.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridStateStore`1
member.summary: Provides a shared state container for hybrid WPF and Blazor contexts.

member.name: E:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridStateStore`1.StateChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the state has changed.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridStateStore`1.Subscribe(System.EventHandler{Dreamine.Hybrid.State.HybridStateChangedEventArgs{`0}})
member.summary: Subscribes to state changes and returns a disposable unsubscriber.
member.returns: A disposable subscription that removes the handler when disposed.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridStateStore`1.State
member.summary: Gets the current state.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridStateStore`1.SetState(`0)
member.summary: Replaces the current state.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Interfaces.IHybridStateStore`1.Update(System.Func{`0,`0})
member.summary: Updates the current state using the specified updater function.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.HybridMessageBase
member.summary: Provides a base implementation for hybrid messages.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.HybridMessageBase.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus
member.summary: Provides an in-memory implementation of .

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus.ExceptionHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets the handler invoked when a subscriber throws an unexpected exception. Defaults to (no-op). Assign a custom handler to wire in logging without coupling this assembly to a logger.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus.Unsubscribe(Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus.Subscription)
member.summary: Removes the specified subscription.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus.Subscription
member.summary: Represents a message subscription.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus.Subscription.#ctor(System.Type,System.Object,System.Action{Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus.Subscription})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus.Subscription.MessageType
member.summary: Gets the subscribed message type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus.Subscription.Handler
member.summary: Gets the message handler.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.InMemoryHybridMessageBus.Subscription.IsDisposed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this subscription has been disposed.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.NullHybridMessageBusExceptionHandler
member.summary: No-op implementation of . Used as the default handler when none is configured.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Hybrid.Messaging.NullHybridMessageBusExceptionHandler.Instance
member.summary: Gets the shared singleton instance.

member.summary: Provides event data for hybrid state changes.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets the changed state.

member.summary: Provides an in-memory shared state store for hybrid applications.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Raises the state changed event.
